meta.title: S4x19 Closing Panel with Rob Lee, Dale Peterson and Zach Tudor
meta.description:
Always a hit at S4, Dale Peterson talks with Rob Lee and Zach Tudor about the state of ICS Cybersecurity. 

What aren't we talking about? Where are we making good progress? Are we gaining ground or losing ground in defending ICS? Speed? Does .gov help? Most important of the 5 NIST CSF functions at this time? And much more.
